title: Flameless Candles LED Candles Battery Candle Set of 9(1 - H 22cm, 1 - H20cm, 1 - H18cm, 2-H16cm, 2-H14cm, 2-H13cm) Ivory True Wax Candle with Remote Timer
features: EASY AND CONVENIENT OPERATION With a remote control, you can control all of our candles by non-flickering flameless candles of different sizes. Timer function allows you to set 2H, 4H, 6H, 8H and turn on/off automatically. Cycle cycle: every 24 hours.
Energy Saving Powerful LEDs:This value pack comes with 9 flickering flameless candles, 1 x remote control. Manual x1 This flameless candle is powered by 2 AA batteries (not included).

Safety comes first: These flameless candles can be used without worrying about the flame. They are absolutely no fire hazard or burn risks. Safe for families with pets or small children. With the amazing flameless candle set, you can spend perfect evenings with safety
The perfect decoration: it can be widely used for birthdays, Christmas, home decorations, bars, hotels, parties, holidays, weddings or other occasions.

Dancing Flame Effect: These flameless candles are so realistic that they are practically indistinguishable from traditional burning candles. Flame simulation technology makes the candles flicker, bringing the most realistic experience to any room.
description: Product Description Flameless Candles 10 Flameless Candles 5" 6" 7" 8" 9" Set of 5 Flameless Candles 4" 5" 6" Set of 3 Flameless Candles with Glass Effect 4" 5" 6" Set of 3 Flameless Candles with Glass Effect 4" 5" 6" 7"8"Set of 5 flameless Candles,Height 10cm × 2, 13.5cm × 2, 16.5cm × 1 Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,549 Price — no data £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £27.99 £ 27 . 99 £31.99 £ 31 . 99 £34.99 £ 34 . 99 Material paraffin paraffin paraffin paraffin paraffin paraffin 3D effect ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Diameter 2.2cm 5.3cm 8cm 8cm 5.5cm 8cm PCS 10 5 3 3 5 5 Glass shell no data no data no data ✓ ✓ no data How to illuminating the Candle Move the OFF-ON switch on the bottom to ON. The candle will illuminate until you manually move the switch to OFF. ON-OFF button: Illuminating the Candle On=Off (Note:Before you use the Remote Control, switch the ON-OFF button to ON at the bottom of the LED candles). 9 x Flameless candles( 22cm, 20cm, 18cm, 2*16cm, 2*14cm, 2*13cm) 2 x 10 key remote control 1 x User Manual More Tips: 1. This candle is made of real wax and is flammable. Do not attempt to light this candle. 2. Keep out of direct sunlight, away from heat sources and out of extreme temperatures or your candle may soften or melt. 3. Constant use of the timer however may considerably reduce battery life. TIMER: set On/Off Automatic Time feature, set to 2Hours/4Hours/6Hours/8Hours. Mode: Candle-Non-Moving Flame;Light-Moving Flame. Brightness Control: Left button to lower the brightness Right button to increase brightness.
